homepage.heroSubline: Durable floors, expertly installed. Serving Cleveland and surrounding areas with pride.
aboutText: Floor Essence & Remodel started with a simple goal: to provide Cleveland homeowners with flooring solutions that last. We're not just installers; we're craftsmen dedicated to quality and precision.
Our approach is straightforward: understand your needs, offer transparent pricing, and deliver impeccable results. We value honesty and integrity in every project, big or small.

We're proud to be a part of the Cleveland community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. Our commitment extends beyond flooring; it's about investing in the city we call home.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Precision and durability are our priority. We ensure your floors are installed correctly, the first time.

valueProps.title: Wide Selection
valueProps.description: From hardwood to tile, we offer a diverse range of flooring options to match your style and budget.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Understanding Cleveland's climate and housing styles allows us to recommend the best flooring solutions for your home.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear, upfront pricing so you know exactly what to expect.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free estimate and discover the difference quality flooring can make.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.shortDescription: Timeless elegance and lasting value for your Cleveland home.
services.description: Hardwood flooring adds warmth and sophistication to any space. We specialize in the installation, repair, and refinishing of hardwood floors throughout Cleveland. Given Cleveland's freeze-thaw cycles, proper subfloor preparation and acclimation are crucial for hardwood longevity. We handle everything from selecting the right wood type to ensuring a flawless finish. We work with solid hardwood, engineered hardwood, and even reclaimed options, catering to both modern and traditional aesthetics. Our team is experienced in dealing with the unique challenges presented by older Cleveland homes, including uneven subfloors and moisture issues. We also offer dustless sanding and refinishing to restore your existing hardwood floors to their former glory. Considering the wear and tear from Cleveland winters, we recommend durable finishes that can withstand heavy foot traffic and protect against scratches and spills.
process: Step 1: Consultation and assessment of your space and needs.
Step 2: Selection of hardwood type, finish, and installation method.
Step 3: Subfloor preparation to ensure a level and stable base.
Step 4: Professional installation with attention to detail and precision.

faq.question: What type of hardwood is best for Cleveland's climate?
faq.answer: Engineered hardwood is often recommended due to its stability in fluctuating humidity levels. It resists warping and cupping better than solid hardwood.

faq.question: How long does hardwood flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the installation. Most residential projects take between 2-5 days.

faq.question: Can you refinish my existing hardwood floors?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer dustless sanding and refinishing services to restore your hardwood floors to their original beauty. This process can remove scratches, dents, and discoloration.

services.name: Tile Flooring
services.shortDescription: Durable, stylish, and easy-to-maintain tile solutions for any room.
services.description: Tile flooring is a versatile and practical choice for kitchens, bathrooms, and other high-traffic areas in Cleveland homes. We offer a wide selection of ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone tiles to suit any style and budget. From classic subway tiles to intricate mosaics, we can create a custom look that reflects your personality. Given Cleveland's cold winters and damp summers, selecting the right tile and grout is crucial for long-term performance. We recommend porcelain tile for its durability and water resistance, especially in bathrooms and entryways prone to snow and salt exposure. Our experienced installers ensure proper waterproofing and sealing to prevent moisture damage and mold growth. We also offer heated flooring options for added comfort during those chilly Cleveland winters. Whether you're renovating your kitchen in Tremont or updating your bathroom in Ohio City, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results.
process: Step 1: Design consultation and tile selection.
Step 2: Subfloor preparation and leveling.
Step 3: Precise tile installation with attention to grout lines.
Step 4: Sealing and finishing for long-lasting protection.
benefits: Wide range of styles and colors

faq.question: What's the difference between ceramic and porcelain tile?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is denser and more water-resistant than ceramic tile, making it a better choice for high-moisture areas like bathrooms and entryways.

faq.question: Can you install tile over existing flooring?
faq.answer: In some cases, yes. However, we'll need to assess the existing floor to ensure it's level, stable, and properly prepared to support the new tile.

faq.question: How do I clean and maintain my tile floors?
faq.answer: Regular sweeping and mopping with a pH-neutral cleaner is usually sufficient. Avoid using abrasive cleaners that can damage the grout.

services.name: Laminate Flooring
services.shortDescription: Affordable and stylish flooring that mimics the look of hardwood or tile.
services.description: Laminate flooring is a cost-effective and durable alternative to hardwood or tile, perfect for budget-conscious Cleveland homeowners. We offer a variety of laminate styles that mimic the look of natural materials, including wood, stone, and tile. Laminate is easy to install and maintain, making it a popular choice for DIY projects and rental properties. While laminate is water-resistant, it's not waterproof, so it's best suited for areas with low moisture exposure. We carefully install a moisture barrier during installation to help combat Cleveland's humid summers. With proper care, laminate flooring can provide years of beauty and functionality at a fraction of the cost of hardwood or tile.
process: Step 1: Subfloor inspection and preparation.
Step 2: Installation of moisture barrier.
Step 3: Precise laminate flooring installation.
Step 4: Finishing touches and cleanup.
benefits: Wide range of styles and colors

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: No, laminate flooring is water-resistant, not waterproof. It's best to avoid using it in areas with high moisture exposure, such as bathrooms or laundry rooms.

faq.question: How do I clean laminate flooring?
faq.answer: Use a damp mop and a pH-neutral cleaner specifically designed for laminate floors. Avoid using excessive water, which can seep into the seams and damage the flooring.

faq.question: Can I install laminate flooring myself?
faq.answer: Yes, laminate flooring is relatively easy to install as a DIY project. However, it's important to follow the manufacturer's instructions carefully to ensure a proper installation.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring
services.shortDescription: Waterproof and resilient flooring ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, and basements.
services.description: Vinyl flooring is a practical and versatile choice for Cleveland homes, especially in areas prone to moisture, such as kitchens, bathrooms, and basements. We offer a wide range of vinyl options, including sheet vinyl, vinyl tile, and luxury vinyl plank (LVP). Vinyl is waterproof, easy to clean, and resistant to scratches and stains, making it a great choice for families with pets or young children. Because many Cleveland homes have basements prone to flooding, vinyl is a great choice. Luxury vinyl plank offers the look and feel of hardwood with the added benefits of waterproof performance and easy maintenance. Our experienced installers ensure proper subfloor preparation and seamless installation for long-lasting beauty and functionality.
process: Step 1: Subfloor inspection and preparation.
Step 2: Precise cutting and fitting of vinyl flooring.
Step 3: Secure installation with adhesive or click-lock system.
Step 4: Sealing and finishing for added protection.
benefits: Wide range of styles and colors

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for basements?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for basements because it's waterproof and resistant to moisture damage.

faq.question: How do I clean vinyl flooring?
faq.answer: Sweep or vacuum regularly to remove dirt and debris. Mop with a damp mop and a mild detergent as needed.

faq.question: What is luxury vinyl plank (LVP)?
faq.answer: Luxury vinyl plank is a type of vinyl flooring that mimics the look of hardwood. It's waterproof, durable, and easy to install, making it a popular choice for homeowners.

services.name: Floor Repair & Restoration
services.shortDescription: Expert repairs to restore your floors to their original beauty and functionality.
services.description: From water damage to scratches and dents, we offer comprehensive floor repair and restoration services throughout Cleveland. We understand the unique challenges that Cleveland's climate and older housing stock can present to flooring. Whether you have damaged hardwood, cracked tile, or worn-out laminate, we can assess the damage and recommend the best course of action. Our skilled craftsmen use quality materials and techniques to restore your floors to their original beauty and functionality. We can repair or replace damaged boards, fill cracks and gaps, and refinish surfaces to create a seamless and durable repair. We also offer water damage restoration services to prevent mold growth and further damage to your home. Don't replace your floors – restore them with Floor Essence & Remodel.
process: Step 1: Thorough assessment of the damage.
Step 2: Repair or replacement of damaged flooring materials.
Step 3: Refinishing or sealing to blend the repair with the existing floor.
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup.
benefits: Extends the life of your floors

faq.question: Can you repair water-damaged hardwood floors?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair water-damaged hardwood floors. However, the extent of the damage will determine the best course of action, which may involve replacing some boards.

faq.question: How do I prevent water damage to my floors?
faq.answer: Address leaks promptly, use mats and rugs in high-traffic areas, and consider installing a dehumidifier in basements.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency floor repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency floor repair services for situations like water damage or structural issues. Contact us immediately, and we'll respond as soon as possible.

services.name: Subfloor Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Ensuring a stable and level foundation for your new or existing floors.
services.description: A solid subfloor is essential for the longevity and performance of any flooring system. We provide expert subfloor installation and repair services throughout Cleveland, addressing issues such as unevenness, moisture damage, and structural weaknesses. Many older homes in neighborhoods like Tremont and Ohio City have subfloors that need attention before new flooring can be installed. We use quality materials and proven techniques to create a stable and level foundation for your new or existing floors. We can repair or replace damaged subfloor panels, level uneven surfaces, and install moisture barriers to prevent future problems. Don't compromise on the foundation of your floors – trust Floor Essence & Remodel for expert subfloor services.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of the existing subfloor.
Step 2: Repair or replacement of damaged subfloor panels.
Step 3: Leveling and smoothing of the subfloor surface.
Step 4: Installation of moisture barrier (if needed).
benefits: Ensures a stable and level flooring surface
Extends the life of your floors
Improves the overall appearance of your floors

faq.question: Why is subfloor preparation important?
faq.answer: A properly prepared subfloor ensures that your new flooring is level, stable, and less likely to develop problems like squeaks, cracks, or uneven wear.

faq.question: How do I know if my subfloor needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of subfloor problems include unevenness, squeaks, spongy spots, and visible damage like cracks or water stains.

faq.question: Can you install a heated subfloor?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install a heated subfloor system for added comfort and warmth, especially in bathrooms and kitchens.

From hardwood refinishing to new tile installation, our experienced team is dedicated to providing top-quality craftsmanship and exceptional customer service. reviews.name: Alice K.
reviews.text: Floor Essence & Remodel did an amazing job installing our new hardwood floors. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look absolutely beautiful. They were very careful with our belongings and cleaned up thoroughly after the job. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: We hired Floor Essence & Remodel to install tile in our kitchen, and we're very happy with the results. There was a small delay due to a supplier issue, but they communicated clearly and kept us informed throughout the process. The tile work is excellent.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Great experience with Floor Essence & Remodel! They installed laminate flooring in our basement, and it looks fantastic. The price was very reasonable, and they finished the job quickly and efficiently. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Floor Essence & Remodel saved us a ton of money by repairing our damaged hardwood floors instead of replacing them. They matched the stain perfectly, and you can't even tell there was ever any damage. Excellent work!

reviews.name: Jennifer S.
reviews.text: We had Floor Essence & Remodel install vinyl flooring in our bathroom. The installation was quick and professional, and the floor looks great. My only complaint is that it took a little longer to get a quote than I expected, but once the job was scheduled, everything went smoothly.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: After discovering some water damage, Floor Essence & Remodel did an outstanding job repairing our subfloor. They were thorough, explained everything clearly, and made sure the new flooring was perfectly level. Highly recommend them for any flooring needs!
